extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ Primož won via bike throw after ALAPHILIPPE Julian celebrated early and was relegated for deviating across the road in the final sprint.
tactical_patterns: Final sprint decided by elimination not attacks—top riders arrived together despite tailwind on Roche-aux-Faucons descent favoring breakaways.
Alaphilippe's line deviation caused Hirschi foot unclipping, revealing sprint chaos when monument finishes bunch together instead of selection.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: Never stopped sprinting while others celebrated, showing mental discipline immediately post-Tour that others lacked
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: Celebrated 20+ meters early and deviated enough to merit relegation, poor tactical awareness in rainbow jersey debut
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: neutral: Podiumed year after 18th place but admitted backing off to avoid crashing rather than contesting win
rider_signals.HIRSCHI Marc: negative: Pulled foot unclipping during sprint interference, lost potential victory through positioning behind erratic Alaphilippe
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: negative: DNF after hitting unmarked road furniture on Côte de Mont-le-Soie descent (94km to go), team vulnerability to course recon gaps
